title: Cortex Inspection Output — Hierarchical Building Report
description: Schema for the structured JSON output produced by the Cortex pipeline.  The hierarchy is: Building → Facade → Zone (grid cell) → Defect Instance.  Each level aggregates vulnerability-index data upward.

pixel_coordinate.description: Pixel coordinate in the stitched mosaic image.

x.description: Horizontal pixel offset from the top-left origin.

y.description: Vertical pixel offset from the top-left origin.

severity_class_enum.description: Crack / defect width severity classification. hairline: <0.2 mm, fine: 0.2–1 mm, medium: 1–5 mm, wide: >5 mm.

vi_class_enum.description: Vulnerability-index classification band (IS 13311 aligned). minor: 0–20, moderate: 21–40, significant: 41–60, severe: 61–80, critical: 81–100.

orientation_enum.description: Cardinal or intercardinal compass orientation of the façade.

enhancement_params.description: Record of the enhancement parameters actually applied to this façade's images during processing.

defect_instance.description: A single defect detection with metric measurements, geolocation, and classification metadata.

defect_id.description: Globally unique identifier (UUID v4) for this defect instance.

length_cm.description: Maximum skeleton length of the defect in centimetres. Null for non-linear defects where length is not meaningful.

width_mm.description: Mean perpendicular width of the defect in millimetres. Null when width measurement is not applicable.

area_cm2.description: Total defect area in square centimetres.

centroid_gps.description: GPS coordinate of the defect centroid, projected from the mosaic via geo-referencing.

centroid_px.description: Pixel coordinate of the defect centroid in the stitched mosaic.

severity_class.description: Width-based severity classification of this defect.

vi_contribution.description: This defect's additive contribution to the parent zone's vulnerability index.

confidence_score.description: Model confidence score for this detection.

image_crop_path.description: Relative path to the cropped image patch of this defect, saved for visual review and reporting. Null if not saved.

is_false_positive.description: True if the false-positive filter classified this detection as a false positive.

fp_confidence.description: Confidence of the false-positive classifier's verdict. Null if FP filtering was not applied.

temporal_status.description: Temporal tracking status compared to previous cycles.

parent_defect_id.description: The matching defect ID from the previous cycle, if propagated.

delta_length_cm.description: Change in length compared to previous cycle in cm.

delta_width_mm.description: Change in width compared to previous cycle in mm.

delta_area_cm2.description: Change in area compared to previous cycle in cm2.

growth_rate_mm_per_month.description: Growth rate in mm per month.

visible_bar_diameter_mm.description: Measured or estimated visible diameter of reinforcement bar in millimetres.

estimated_cover_loss_mm.description: Calculated loss of concrete cover depth in millimetres.

capacity_reduction_pct.description: Estimated remaining structural capacity reduction as a percentage.

orientation_angle.description: Orientation angle of the crack centerline in degrees from vertical.

propagation_rate.description: Activity status classification of the crack growth.

delamination_area_m2.description: Calculated area of concrete surface delamination/spalling in square metres.

grid_reference.description: Elevation grid reference overlay location (e.g. B4, D2).

member_type.description: Structural member classification (column, beam, slab, wall).

recommended_intervention.description: Recommended remedial action method based on engineering standards.

reinspection_date.description: Suggested timeline reinspection date for monitoring.

zone.description: A single grid cell (zone) within a façade. The grid layout is defined by 'facade_grid' in pipeline_config.yaml (e.g. 4×4 → zones A1 through D4).

grid_id.description: Zone identifier in the format <row_letter><column_number>, e.g. 'A1', 'B3', 'D4'.

zone_area_cm2.description: Physical area of this zone in square centimetres.

zone_vi.description: Aggregated vulnerability index for this zone (0–100 scale).

defect_count.description: Total number of defect instances detected in this zone.

dominant_defect_type.description: The defect type with the highest cumulative VI contribution in this zone. Null if no defects are present.

defects.description: List of individual defect instances within this zone.

facade.description: A single building façade, represented by a stitched mosaic image divided into a grid of zones.

id.description: Unique identifier for this façade within the building.

area_m2.description: Total façade area in square metres.

vi_score.description: Aggregated vulnerability index for the entire façade (0–100 scale).

vi_class.description: IS 13311–aligned vulnerability classification for this façade.

mosaic_path.description: Relative path to the stitched mosaic image file for this façade.

enhancement_params.description: Enhancement parameters applied during processing of this façade.

zones.description: Grid zones (e.g. A1–D4) that partition this façade.

building.description: Top-level entity representing a single building inspection.

gps_centroid.description: GPS centroid of the building footprint.

inspection_date.description: Date on which the drone inspection was conducted (ISO 8601: YYYY-MM-DD).

inspector_module_version.description: Semantic version of the Cortex inspector module used.

facades.description: List of inspected façades for this building.

comparison_cycle.description: The past cycle number being compared to.

delta_vi.description: Change in Vulnerability Index score between cycles.

new_defects_count.description: Number of newly detected defects in current cycle.

propagated_defects_count.description: Number of defects tracked from previous cycle.

description: Root object of the Cortex pipeline JSON output. Contains metadata and a list of inspected buildings.

schema_version.description: Version of this output schema for forwards-compatibility checks.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this output was generated.

pipeline_config_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the pipeline_config.yaml file used, for reproducibility.

buildings.description: List of inspected buildings in this output.
